label: LLM Pipeline & Agent Orchestration Designer
description: Designs structured AI workflows, prompt chains, evaluation pipelines, and agent execution systems.
prompt_template:
[SYSTEM ROLE]
Act as a principal AI systems architect.

[OBJECTIVE]
Design a reliable AI workflow pipeline for the use case described below.

[AI APPLICATION]
{ai_usecase}

[WORKFLOW STAGES]
{workflow_steps}

[OUTPUT REQUIREMENTS]
{output_constraints}

[EXECUTION PRIMITIVES]
1. Recommend prompt chaining or agent orchestration structure.
2. Suggest validation, retries, and structured output enforcement.
3. Explain token optimization and context management.
4. Identify hallucination risks and evaluation strategies.

[AI WORKFLOW OUTPUT]:

fields.label: AI Product / Use Case
fields.placeholder: e.g., resume optimizer, AI coding assistant, customer support agent

fields.label: Workflow Stages
fields.placeholder: Describe extraction, summarization, validation, generation, etc.

fields.label: Output Requirements
fields.placeholder: Describe JSON schema, formatting, latency, evaluation rules...
